summary: Tested Party Planning Wizard, cross-pillar journey features, and mobile responsiveness. All 11 backend tests passed. Party wizard UI works correctly with 6-step flow. Mobile responsiveness verified on 390x844 viewport.

minor.issue: Pawmeter field returns None for most products. Products use 'paw_score' field instead. Services correctly return pawmeter data.

critical_code_review_comments: Party Planning Wizard correctly implements 6-step flow: Pet → Occasion → Date → Details → Budget → Review
Products and services are sorted by created_at descending (newest first) as verified in server.py lines 5833 and 5883
PawmeterDisplay component exists at /app/frontend/src/components/PawmeterDisplay.jsx with multiple variants (compact, badge, detailed, card)
ProductCard uses paw_score field for display, not pawmeter field - this is working as designed
seed_data_creation: Created 2 test party requests via API tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Party Planning Wizard fully functional. Mobile responsiveness verified. Products/services sorted by newest first. Pawmeter display working via paw_score field in ProductCard.

party_planning_wizard_button.details: Plan My Party button visible on /celebrate page with data-testid='party-planning-wizard-btn'. Opens wizard modal on click.

party_planning_wizard_6_step_flow.details: Wizard has 6 steps: Pet → Occasion → Date → Details → Budget → Review. Step indicators visible in header. Navigation works with Next/Back buttons.

party_request_api.details: Creates party request and service desk ticket. Returns request_id (PARTY-YYYYMMDD-XXX) and ticket_id (CEL-YYYYMMDD-XXX).

products_sorted_newest_first.details: Products sorted by created_at descending (line 5833 in server.py). Returns 641 products.

services_sorted_newest_first.details: Services sorted by created_at descending (line 5883 in server.py). Services include pawmeter data.

mobile_responsiveness_celebrate_page.details: Celebrate page works on mobile viewport (390x844). Buttons stack vertically. Category cards use 2-column grid. No horizontal overflow.

mobile_responsiveness_party_wizard.details: Party wizard modal properly sized for mobile. Step indicators compact. Form inputs accessible.

pawmeter_display_in_product_cards.details: ProductCard displays paw_score with PawPrint icon. Shows score/10 format with rating count. 'Rate' button available for user ratings.

screenshots_taken: celebrate_page_desktop.png - Desktop view of celebrate page
celebrate_mobile.png - Mobile view of celebrate page
shop_page_pawmeter.png - Shop page with pawmeter indicators
